caption: A man with a tall, spiked grey wig and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt with gold suspenders and a red and white bowtie. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and various items, including a yellow sign with the word "LEE". Two logos appear on screen: a white and red logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a neutral look to an open-mouthed expression of speech.
